HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask1: Some strange tracks here and there... right on the grass!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask2: All the flowers have been trampled!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask3: Some of the bushes have been eaten!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask4: And some of the flowers, too!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask5: What can eat a lawn like this?!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask6: It seemed to go over here!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask8: Need to screw this back on!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask10: Good grief! What happened to this flowerbed?
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask11: I need to clean these tracks.
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask13: Looks like the beast broke these chairs!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask14: I need to remove the broken chairs.
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask15: I need to fix the table, as well.
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask16: The hedge is destroyed! I have to fix it!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask17: Did the beast lick the windows?!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask18: Someone chomped on the curtain too?
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask19: And left muddy tracks on the entrance floor?!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask21: Need to vacuum all these strange hairs...
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask22: It ate all of Grandma's knitting thread!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask23: I need to tape this floor down again.
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask24: It broke some vases when it left!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask25: It seems it took the door with it. Let's put it back.
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask26: How big is this thing? Let's measure its stride.
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask27: Hmm, the tracks seem to disappear here...
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask28: Now I got it! Had to cut down some grass.
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask29: And we are back on track! A well brushed track.
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask30: Some flowerpots seemed to be broken!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask31: Did it get startled by this butterfly?
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask32: I need to saw some branches to progress here.
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask33: I can almost hear it! It's like it's eating something!
HotspotDescription_LoungeCharacterTask35: I almost see it, but it's just too dark!

HotspotDescription_SpeakEasyCharacterTas: First, a disguise to get around. Plumber, maybe?
Got to have tools for the job!
Turns out I actually have to fix some pipes...
Just in case I need to cut open a lock...
I managed to find a secret corridor, but it's dark!
Flowers for the receptionist? That should distract her.
There's something under the floorboards...
Ugh, just dust and moldy wood...
So much dust!
I'll need a gardener disguise!

HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask8: The speaker is barely holding on.

HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask12: More flowers ruined. I can't bear it.

HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask15: This table has an Arthur shaped hole.

HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask20: Cushions, torn apart. No respect at all.
HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask21: They overturned tables outside. Was this truly necessary?

HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask26: Fence plank loosened. Another fine touch.
HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask27: This bench toppled over while they tussled.
HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask28: Roddy's head bent the gate quite a bit.
HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask29: This broken vase was 100 years old.
HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask30: Another ruined decoration. My heart can't take this.
HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask32: More of my poor flowers ruined.

HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask34: They splashed mud all over like beasts.
HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask35: They chipped the fountain edge with their heads.
HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask38: Pebbles all over. Because why not.
HotspotDescription_CinemaCharacterTask40: The last mess to fix. Finally.
